data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Upcoming inspection reminders' as part of the safety inspection process. However, the evidence does not include any information or confirmation regarding the implementation or existence of such reminders. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence fails to support the expected result of confirming requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of upcoming inspection reminders being implemented or confirmed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
